CVE-2020-25657.title: A flaw was found in all released versions of m2crypto, where they ...
CVE-2020-25657.summary: A flaw was found in all released versions of m2crypto, where they are vulnerable to Bleichenbacher timing attacks in the RSA decryption API via the timed processing of valid PKCS#1 v1.5 Ciphertext. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to confidentiality.

CVE-2023-50781.title: A flaw was found in m2crypto. This issue may allow a remote attac ...
CVE-2023-50781.summary: A flaw was found in m2crypto. This issue may allow a remote attacker to decrypt captured messages in TLS servers that use RSA key exchanges, which may lead to exposure of confidential or sensitive data.
